. Jup + Ketu
Jupiter is posited in 7th to Mars+Sun. With this the father
of the native will have position equal to a Minister. Mars + Sun
+ Ruhu + Jupiter's aspect indicate eminence Political Mentor.
Venus is the Native Venus is conjoined with Mercury. Moon is in
5th to Mercury. Retro Jupiter aspect the rear sign. With this Venus
+ Mercury and Moon get Jupiter's aspect. Since Moon is in II th
in Leo, Venus+ Mercury+ Moon will get Jupiter's aspect. With
this reason, she marries with an inter cast Person.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OP NADI ASTROLOGY
OM
WHAT IS ASTROLOGY
Ancient epics and scriptures, establish that God Created the
universe and all the creatures. The Vedas and commentaries there
on proclaim that
"TAT STUSHTWAATADEVAAN PRAVISHAT AHAM
BHAHUSYA MI."
Advaita says, "AHAM BRAHMASMI". God is
Omnipotent, and Omnivariant. By his TEJAS- the Glow of the
Almighty the entire process of the universe flows. This is carried
on through the nature and the creatures appearing in various
